message:
feat(cli): implement ~15 CLI commands replacing NotImplemented stubs

Implement: lint, typecheck, migrate, list-projects (--json,
--include-agents), clear-and-reset-everything, config (set-port,
show-port), projects (mark-identity, discovery-init, adopt), mail
status, list-acks, doctor check (--verbose, --json), guard status,
and guard check (--stdin-nul, --advisory).

Add open_db_sync() helper for direct synchronous SQLite access from CLI
handlers. Add CliError::Other(String) variant.

Add sqlmodel-core, sqlmodel-sqlite, and mcp-agent-mail-db as CLI crate
dependencies. Include legacy_cli_inventory.json fixture (17KB) for
Python CLI parity tracking.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
